label: Automated theorem proving & mathematical AI

node.label: Automated theorem proving & mathematical AI
node.definition: Mathematical-AI systems search for proofs, verify derivations, solve formal problems, manipulate symbols, and combine learned guidance with trusted checkers.
node.why_it_matters: This system is an application boundary where technical capability, evidence, safety controls, economics, and user workflow must succeed together.

limitations: End-to-end quality is bounded by the weakest data, model, tool, interface, policy, infrastructure, and human-oversight component. Its direct dependencies include Theorem proving & symbolic deduction, Large language models.
